description: HOMESERVER Caduceus public lever runtime. Rust owns source sync, cargo build, binary install, profile/policy/state convergence, caduceus.service standup, and HTTP health proof; this sidecar carries constants only.

managed_files.content:
[Unit]
Description=Caduceus HOMESERVER public appliance lever
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/caduceus serve
Environment=CADUCEUS_BIND=0.0.0.0:3014
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2
NoNewPrivileges=yes
PrivateTmp=yes
ProtectSystem=strict
ProtectHome=yes
ReadWritePaths=/var/lib/caduceus /var/lib/harmonia /var/log/harmonia /var/cache/harmonia /var/cache/caduceus /opt/caduceus /usr/local/bin /etc/caduceus /etc/systemd/system

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

schema: caduceus.profile.v1
profile: homeserver
mode: homeserver
harmonia_profile: /etc/harmonia/profiles/homeserver/index.json
commands:
- help
- identity show
- profile show
- health
- legacy-sbin list
- legacy-sbin show
- network status
- homeserver-sbin list
- homeserver-sbin show
- staff status
- staff actuators
